structure_under_test: DISPLAYED v0.4-SPU build (SPU-only de-biasing, w=0.5; the site's published columns), re-checked against the criteria pre-registered on v0.3

discriminant_governance_R2.test: R^2 of v0_3_composite regressed on wb_wgi_rule_of_law (risk-aligned).
discriminant_governance_R2.expected: High positive association (governance co-travels) BUT R^2 < 1.
discriminant_governance_R2.pass_if: R^2 <= 0.80  (i.e. >=20% of composite variance is NOT governance).
discriminant_governance_R2.FAIL_if: R^2 > 0.90   (index is governance with a relabel -> discriminant FAIL).

incremental_FL_structure.test: Governance-residualized composite vs the orthogonal/low-laden IPUMS FL-proximate layer (child_labour, internal_migration_5yr; both <0.30 |r| with governance per ipums memo), and vs climate (ND-GAIN) & conflict (UCDP) net of governance.
incremental_FL_structure.expected: child_labour +, internal_migration +, climate +, conflict + (all positive risk).
incremental_FL_structure.pass_if: AT LEAST ONE non-circular FL-proximate residual correlation is positive in the pre-registered direction AND BH-significant at the spatial effective-df.
incremental_FL_structure.FAIL_if: NO FL-proximate residual is positive & BH-significant -> incremental-validity NOT demonstrated.

convergent_vs_realized_prevalence.test: Residual-on-residual (governance netted BOTH sides) vs GSI estimated prevalence /1,000.
convergent_vs_realized_prevalence.pass_if: residualized rho > 0 and BH-significant at effective-df.
convergent_vs_realized_prevalence.FAIL_if: residualized rho <= 0 OR not significant -> 'convergent validity vs realized prevalence NOT demonstrated' (reported, not hidden). NB benchmark is itself contaminated (GSI prevalence Spearman ~0.50 vs governance) so a null here is uninformative, not disconfirming.

REFUSED_criteria.GSI_Total_Vulnerability: REFUSED — r~0.91 with governance == circular (shares the backbone).
REFUSED_criteria.GLOTIP_detection: REFUSED — sign-INVERTED (Spearman ~ -0.27 vs governance); detection is a state-capacity artifact, not prevalence. Convergence with it would reward strong states.

internal_structure_R_E.test: Correlation of R (Recruitment/structural) and E (Exploitation/enabling) phase scores.
internal_structure_R_E.expected: positive but well below unity (distinct, not redundant).

uncertainty_tiers.test: Monte-Carlo rank stability -> report TIERS not precise mid-table ranks.
uncertainty_tiers.pass_if: top-decile retention >= 0.70 under mild noise (tiers defensible).
uncertainty_tiers.FAIL_if: top-decile retention < 0.50 (even the extremes are unstable).

mechanism_kafala_COHERENCE.test: Do kafala-system states sit elevated on R? (LABELLED COHERENCE, not validation.)
mechanism_kafala_COHERENCE.expected: kafala states above non-kafala median on R.
mechanism_kafala_COHERENCE.note: This is a coherence/face check, NOT an independent criterion. Cannot 'fail' the index; reported as coherence only.

spatial.geometry_source: Natural Earth 1:110m admin_0 countries (LABEL_X/LABEL_Y centroids, REGION_UN, SUBREGION). data/geometry/country_geometry.csv
spatial.weights: inverse-distance, 4000km bandwidth, row-standardised; haversine on centroids

convergent_prevalence_verdict: NOT RUN (GSI workbook not present locally; license-gated — see data/raw/walk_free_gsi/)

uncertainty.packing_note: composite tightly packed in mid-table -> report TIERS not precise mid-ranks

mechanism_kafala_COHERENCE.LABEL: COHERENCE CHECK — not an independent validation criterion; cannot pass/fail the index.

OVERALL_VERDICT.convergent_vs_realized_prevalence: NOT RUN (GSI workbook not present locally; license-gated — see data/raw/walk_free_gsi/)
